mapper.select: select * from music where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into music (cover_images, music_name, singer_name, music_desc, album_title, release_date, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) values (#{music.coverImages}, #{music.musicName}, #{music.singerName}, #{music.musicDesc}, #{music.albumTitle}, #{music.releaseDate}, #{music.createTime}, #{music.updateTime}, #{music.isDeleted})
mapper.update:
update music
cover_images=#{music.coverImages},
music_name=#{music.musicName},
singer_name=#{music.singerName},
music_desc=#{music.musicDesc},
album_title=#{music.albumTitle},
release_date=#{music.releaseDate},
is_deleted=#{music.isDeleted},
update_time=#{music.updateTime}
where id = #{music.id}
